summary: P0 Enterprise Public REST API feature testing complete. All core functionality working: API key management (create/list/revoke), public API v1 endpoints (status, seal, verify, seals, requests), scope enforcement, usage logging. Frontend Developer Portal loads correctly with API Reference (6 endpoints) and API Keys tabs.

minor.issue: Occasional 502 timeout due to Hedera testnet connectivity - blockchain operations may take 5-60s depending on network latency

issues:
FIXED: HTML nesting warning - Badge (
) was inside

tag. Changed to

wrapper.

critical_code_review_comments: Good: API key hashing uses SHA256 for secure storage
Good: Raw key is returned only once at creation time, never stored
Good: Key prefix (first 12 chars) shown in list for identification
Good: Max 5 active keys limit enforced per user
Good: Scope checking implemented - read/seal/verify scopes properly enforced
Good: API call logging to api_logs collection working
Good: Usage count increment on each API call working
Good: Public /api/v1/status endpoint works without auth
Good: Rate limiting applied via slowapi (30-60/min per endpoint)
Good: Frontend DeveloperPage has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Good: Dashboard header has API button linking to /developers

success_rate.backend: 91% (20/22 tests passed, 2 failed due to transient Hedera testnet timeout)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Developer Portal loads, all tabs work, key creation/revoke works)

seed_data_creation: Created/cleaned up test API keys prefixed with TEST_
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public REST API feature fully tested. API key endpoints at /api/developer/keys (JWT auth). Public API at /api/v1/* (X-API-Key header auth). Seal endpoint creates real Hedera topics - may timeout if testnet is slow. Rate limiting on /api/auth/login is 10/min. Max 5 active keys per user.

api_key_management.POST /api/developer/keys: WORKING - creates key, returns raw key once
api_key_management.GET /api/developer/keys: WORKING - lists keys with prefix only
api_key_management.GET /api/developer/usage: WORKING - returns usage stats and recent activity

public_api_v1.GET /api/v1/status: WORKING - no auth required, returns operational status
public_api_v1.POST /api/v1/seal: WORKING - seals hash on Hedera, returns seal_id and blockchain info
public_api_v1.POST /api/v1/verify: WORKING - verifies hash, returns verified true/false
public_api_v1.GET /api/v1/requests: WORKING - lists notarization requests with status filter

frontend_developer_portal.endpoint_expansion: WORKING - shows example request/response with copy button
frontend_developer_portal.api_keys_tab: WORKING - create form, usage stats, keys list
frontend_developer_portal.create_key_flow: WORKING - creates key, shows raw key, adds to list
frontend_developer_portal.revoke_key_flow: WORKING - revoke button on key rows
